Name: Stone Tablet Fragment
Description: A fragment of a stone tablet engraved with and acient spell conjured once spoke. Assembling all the fragments will require a certain magical rite.

Name: Priestess' Wish
Description: A fleeting wish left behinf by a White Priestess at the moment of her death.

Name: Amulet Fragment
Description: Part of an amulet worn by a White Priestess. The tiny shattered fragment still glows with a faint light.

Name: Amulet Gem
Description: A magic stone used to create an amulet worn by a White Priestess. Grants increased protection from the Blighted.

Name: Chain of Sorcery
Description: A magical chain that links with the power contained in a relic.

Name: Ancient Soul
Use: Used to enhance the Umbral Knight
Description: Powerful residue shed from ancient people unlike those of the kingdom. Allows for the Umbral Knight's skills to be enhanced at Respites.
